/opt/rh/devtoolset-7/root/usr/bin/c++  -fopenmp -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -rdynamic CMakeFiles/test_mtpBModule.dir/tests/test_mtpBModule.cc.o -o ../../bin/descriptor/mtp/test_mtpBModule  -Wl,-rpath,/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib:/data/home/liuhanyu/hyliu/code/rubbish/test/AI2Pot/source/build/lib/descriptor/mtp ../../lib/libgtest.a ../../lib/libgtest_main.a /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so ../../lib/descriptor/mtp/libmtpBModule.so ../../lib/libgtest.a -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so -lpthread -Wl,-rpath-link,/data/home/liuhanyu/hyliu/code/rubbish/test/AI2Pot/source/build/lib/descriptor/mtp
